summary: The diff implements all 10 requirements comprehensively. All major sections (Hero, About, ProgramOverview, PhonicsActivitiesDemo, LearningStrategies, Testimonials, Contact, Header, Footer) are created or rebuilt with blue-green gradient theme, phonics-based activities, animated elements, and correct branding. One image asset reference (mascot-phonics.dim_400x400.png) appears missing from the generatedImages.ts mapping, but otherwise all requirements are well-covered. A WordBuilding drag-and-drop activity is implemented beyond what was requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Pixar HD-style illustration of a cute animated owl or animal mascot holding a letter card (mascot-phonics.dim_400x400.png) should be referenced and used as a decorative element in the activities section per REQ-5 AC requiring Pixar-style character illustrations as decorative elements
missing_requirements.reason: The generatedImages.ts file does not include a mapping for mascot-phonics.dim_400x400.png, and the PhonicsActivitiesDemo and activity components do not reference this mascot image as a decorative Pixar-style character illustration.

hallucinated_features.description: WordBuilding drag-and-drop activity component where children select letters to spell words with validation, emoji hints, success animations, and audio feedback
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-5 only requested an alphabet pronunciation demo, a letter-sound matching quiz, and a word pronunciation exercise. A word-building or letter-spelling construction activity was not part of the specification.
